component.name: FrostFinder
component.summary: A fast, modern file manager inspired by macOS Finder

description.p: FrostFinder is a column-based file manager for Linux inspired by macOS Finder. It combines native performance (Rust + Tauri) with a clean, modern interface.

ul.li: Column, List, Icon, and Gallery views
Quick Look previews with Space bar (images, video, audio, documents, archives)
Dual-pane view with drag-and-drop between panes
Full-text and regex search across the filesystem
Tags and colour labels stored in extended attributes
Batch rename with live before/after preview
SMB, WebDAV, SFTP, and FTP remote mounts
Compression (ZIP, TAR.GZ, TAR.BZ2, TAR.XZ) and archive preview
Disk usage treemap, file diff, secure delete, and duplicate finder
Localised into English, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, and Japanese
Full keyboard navigation and ARIA accessibility

screenshot.caption: Column view — browse directories in a cascading multi-column layout
Gallery view with Quick Look preview panel
Dual-pane view for side-by-side file management

description.p: Beta 6, r26 — Compile fix for r25 lofty audio tag integration
Beta 6, r25 — Native audio tag editing (no exiftool required)

ul.li: Audio tag editor (Edit Tags) now works natively via the lofty Rust crate
Supports MP3/ID3v2, FLAC, OGG, Opus, M4A, WAV — no system tools needed
Comment field added to audio tag editor
Error message no longer suggests installing exiftool for audio files
Split pane now restores full-width view when closed
Icon theme folder scanner is now recursive (finds icons in subdirectories)
Settings dialog fully redesigned — readable labels, consistent spacing
Icon theme "Load from folder" now works — dialog:allow-open permission added
Split pane no longer opens blank — navigates to directory on open
Split pane toggle button added to toolbar view-switcher
Progress bar no longer overlaps Settings/Cheatsheet footer buttons

description.p: Beta 6, r22 — Phase 14: UI/UX Bug Fixes

ul.li: New windows no longer inherit main window session (blank window fix)
Split-pane state is now per-window — Ctrl+\ correctly toggles in each window independently
Keyboard shortcuts cheatsheet button added to sidebar footer beside Settings
Icon theme picker gains a remove button to unload disk themes

description.p: Beta 6, r20 — Phase 12: Test Coverage Expansion + Bug Fixes

ul.li: afterEach now correctly imported in utils.test.js and a11y.test.js
VIDEO_EXTS extended to include flv, wmv, 3gp — matching Rust backend
views.js codec badge set now includes 3gp for full parity with Rust
All previously untested utils.js exports now covered (196 JS test cases total)
Fixed renderSidebar() closing brace placed 127 lines too early, causing SFTP, FTP, SMB, and WebDAV/Cloud sidebar sections to run once at startup instead of refreshing on every call
Network mount sidebar sections (SFTP, FTP, SMB, Cloud) now correctly update when connecting, disconnecting, or switching directories
macOS build: .app bundle and .dmg for Apple Silicon and Intel
Windows build: .msi and NSIS installer
Cross-platform CI matrix — Rust compile check on macOS and Windows on every tag
Platform-conditional xattr, FUSE detection, and drive enumeration

description.p: Phase 4 — Git status badges and encrypted vaults:

ul.li: 6px git status dots on files in Column and List views (modified, staged, untracked, conflict)
Branch name pill in the toolbar path bar with dirty indicator
Encrypted vault creation and management via gocryptfs (optional runtime dependency)
Locked vaults appear in the sidebar with one-click unlock; unlocked vaults navigate like any folder
Ctrl+Shift+V opens the Vaults dialog; Ctrl+Shift+G opens Cloud Storage
Google Drive, Dropbox, and OneDrive support via rclone (optional runtime dependency)
OAuth2 browser sign-in flow — credentials managed by rclone, never stored by FrostFinder
Mounted cloud drives appear in the sidebar Cloud section with unmount button
Cloud mounts restored automatically on startup
Ctrl+Shift+G opens the Connect Cloud Storage dialog

description.p: Phase 2 — Inline text editor and find-in-file:

ul.li: Inline CodeMirror 6 editor for all text and code files in Quick Look
Syntax highlighting for JS, TS, Python, Rust, CSS, HTML, JSON, Markdown, XML, TOML
Edit / Save (Ctrl+S) / Discard workflow with dirty-state guard
Atomic file writes (temp-file + rename, never corrupts original on crash)
Ctrl+F find-in-file — CodeMirror search panel for text, DOM highlight search for other content
Navigation and close guarded against unsaved changes
Flatpak and AUR packages now published (Flathub and AUR submissions open)
Arabic translation added with full RTL layout support
Locale validator script ensures all translations stay in sync
TRANSLATION.md guide for contributors
Fixed malformed AppStream name tag in metainfo

description.p: Phase 10 — Video thumbnails and bug fixes:

ul.li: Video thumbnails via ffmpeg (optional) in Icon and Gallery views with play overlay
Fixed keyboard shortcut cheatsheet rendering blank
Fixed WatchMode::Off dead code warning
Various build fixes and stability improvements
Video thumbnails generated via ffmpeg with graceful fallback
Play indicator overlay on video items in Icon and Gallery views
All 15 Orca screen reader scenarios now implemented
View mode switches, toast messages, pane focus, and Trash count announced via live region
20 Rust unit tests covering core filesystem operations and data structures
JavaScript test suite (Vitest + jsdom) for view rendering and utilities
Settings now persist to ~/.config/frostfinder/settings.json across reinstalls
GitHub Actions CI pipeline (lint, test, build on every push)
Added Spanish, French, German, Chinese (Simplified), and Japanese translations
Language picker added to Settings → Appearance
Flatpak, AUR PKGBUILD, and .desktop packaging files added
